notes: Tier-2 themes authored at v1 freeze. §4.2 sign-offs resolved 2026-05-01 (Bharat): ABBOTINDIA dropped from CAPEX_PLI_BENEFICIARY (pharma subsidiary, not capex/PLI); NYKAA added to QUICK_COMMERCE (consumer-tech listed cohort; theme expected to grow as more QC names list 2026-2028). DATA_CENTRES_ADJACENT membership still pending verification.

themes.rationale: Private + private-style PSU banks benefiting from digital banking adoption + UPI ecosystem leadership
PSU banks rerating post-asset-quality cleanup; structurally distinct from private banks
Large-cap mass IT services facing AI-driven productivity headwind on commodity work
Engineering R&D + niche tech services positioned as AI-tailwind beneficiaries
Indian defence-PSU set benefiting from war-economy capex cycle (post-2022 Russia-Ukraine onset)
Listed hospital chains positioned for robotic-surgery + outpatient-margin transition
Data-centre capex cluster — names with explicit DC capex announcements + adjacent power/realty exposure

rule_definition.predicate: listing_year in [2020, 2021, 2022] AND sector in ['Consumer-services', 'Tech', 'Logistics'] AND was_loss_making_at_listing == True

themes.rationale: Loss-making-at-listing new-economy IPO cohort; structurally distinct from profitable-listing names
Renewable energy + transition-power names; PLI-batteries-driven capex
Capital goods + PLI-aligned engineering names benefiting from manufacturing capex cycle. ABBOTINDIA removed 2026-05-01 (pharma subsidiary, doesn't fit CAPEX/PLI thesis).

rule_definition.liquidity_caveat: limited liquidity for now; cohort expected to grow as more QC names list 2026-2028 (SWIGGY, etc.)

themes.rationale: Quick commerce + last-mile delivery + consumer-tech listed cohort; valuation-rerating theme. NYKAA added 2026-05-01 to satisfy §4.3 ≥3-member minimum and broaden to consumer-tech delivery.
EV + auto-tech transition cohort; KPITTECH overlaps with IT_AI_TAILWIND_ER_AND_D by design
